vault.title: AI Session Vault
vault.description: Back up, verify, and safely restore local AI coding sessions without modifying active application data.

placeholders.sourceRoot: Use the application's default storage path

restore.title: Isolated native recovery
restore.unsupported: The selected application does not support native restore

errors.restoreUnsupported: The selected application does not support native restore
errors.sessionRequired: Enter the native session ID for a single-session restore

confirm.sync: Start a real incremental backup? Active application data will remain read-only.
confirm.restore: Create an isolated recovery directory? The destination must not already exist.
confirm.closeActive: A Vault task is still running. Cancel it and close?
